episodes.title: Zero Day
episodes.description: Analyst Mira Holt discovers an anomaly in a financial institution's security logs — the breach is years old.

episodes.title: The Footprint
episodes.description: Tracing the intrusion backward reveals it originated from three different countries simultaneously.

episodes.title: Honeypot
episodes.description: Mira deploys a trap — and the attacker walks straight into it, which is exactly what worries her.

episodes.title: Attribution
episodes.description: Who did this? Nation-state, criminal enterprise, or something with no name yet.

episodes.title: The Inside Wall
episodes.description: Evidence points toward an insider — someone with legitimate access and no motive on paper.

episodes.title: White Noise
episodes.description: Mira is placed under surveillance as her own team begins to question her loyalty.

episodes.title: Counteroffensive
episodes.description: Mira goes off the grid to pursue the one lead no one in the organization will touch.

episodes.title: System Down
episodes.description: The circuit closes — and the full scope of the conspiracy becomes terrifyingly clear.

episodes.title: Reconstruction
episodes.description: In the wake of season one's revelations, Mira rebuilds her network from scratch.

episodes.title: New Architecture
episodes.description: The adversary has moved — to infrastructure, not institutions.

episodes.title: Physical Layer
episodes.description: The attacks aren't purely digital — there's a physical component to the targeting.

episodes.title: The Architect
episodes.description: A shadowy figure behind the campaign finally makes contact — on their own terms.

episodes.title: Cascading Failure
episodes.description: Multiple systems begin failing simultaneously — the campaign enters its final phase.

episodes.title: Cold Boot
episodes.description: Mira executes a plan that requires burning everything she's built to stop the Architect.

extras.title: Technical Advisor Interview
extras.description: Cybersecurity professionals discuss the show's realism.

extras.title: Writing Cold Circuit
extras.description: Creator's commentary on the research and story architecture.
